latin: Ego sum inevitabilis. Thanus gemmis omnibus collectis digitos fregit. sed alter vir ferreus respondit: et ego — ego sum Vir Ferreus.

questions.prompt: What does Thanos declare himself to be?
Who counters Thanos's snap with his own?

translation: I am inevitable. Thanos, having collected all the gems, snapped his fingers. But the other iron man replied: and I — I am Iron Man.
